'''鈭歮-m-sh-ch''' ('''kamamshechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ribolyse|ribolyse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ribolyse|ribolyse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-m-sh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kamamshechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimamshechoko|thimamshechoko]] || [[word:jimamshechoko|jimamshechoko]] || [[word:shimamshechoko|shimamshechoko]] || [[word:kimamshechoko|kimamshechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumamshechoko|thuthumamshechoko]] || [[word:jujumamshechoko|jujumamshechoko]] || [[word:shushumamshechoko|shushumamshechoko]] || [[word:kukumamshechoko|kukumamshechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumamshechoko|thumamshechoko]] || [[word:jumamshechoko|jumamshechoko]] || [[word:shumamshechoko|shumamshechoko]] || [[word:kumamshechoko|kumamshechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomamshechoko|thomamshechoko]] || [[word:jomamshechoko|jomamshechoko]] || [[word:shomamshechoko|shomamshechoko]] || [[word:komamshechoko|komamshechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomamshechoko|thomamshechoko]] || [[word:jomamshechoko|jomamshechoko]] || [[word:shomamshechoko|shomamshechoko]] || [[word:komamshechoko|komamshechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mamshechoko|th忙mamshechoko]] || [[word:j忙mamshechoko|j忙mamshechoko]] || [[word:sh忙mamshechoko|sh忙mamshechoko]] || [[word:k忙mamshechoko|k忙mamshechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamamshechoko|thathamamshechoko]] || [[word:jajamamshechoko|jajamamshechoko]] || [[word:shashamamshechoko|shashamamshechoko]] || [[word:kakamamshechoko|kakamamshechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamamshechoko|thamamshechoko]] || [[word:jamamshechoko|jamamshechoko]] || [[word:shamamshechoko|shamamshechoko]] || [[word:kamamshechoko|kamamshechoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
